'''naposo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zail|zail]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-p-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zail|zail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| naposo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næpeseth|næpeseth]] || [[word:næpesej|næpesej]] || [[word:næpesesh|næpesesh]] || [[word:næpese|næpese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:napoposoth|napoposoth]] || [[word:napoposoj|napoposoj]] || [[word:napopososh|napopososh]] || [[word:napoposo|napoposo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:naposoth|naposoth]] || [[word:naposoj|naposoj]] || [[word:napososh|napososh]] || [[word:naposo|naposo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:napofsoth|napofsoth]] || [[word:napofsoj|napofsoj]] || [[word:napofsosh|napofsosh]] || [[word:napofsof|napofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:naposotho|naposotho]] || [[word:naposojo|naposojo]] || [[word:napososho|napososho]] || [[word:naposoko|naposoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:naposoth|naposoth]] || [[word:naposoj|naposoj]] || [[word:napososh|napososh]] || [[word:naposo|naposo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:naposothol|naposothol]] || [[word:naposojol|naposojol]] || [[word:napososhol|napososhol]] || [[word:naposokol|naposokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:naposothotho|naposothotho]] || [[word:naposojojo|naposojojo]] || [[word:napososhosho|napososhosho]] || [[word:naposoko|naposoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:naposothon|naposothon]] || [[word:naposojon|naposojon]] || [[word:napososhon|napososhon]] || [[word:naposokon|naposokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:naposothoro|naposothoro]] || [[word:naposojoro|naposojoro]] || [[word:napososhoro|napososhoro]] || [[word:naposokoro|naposokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
